pred: MATCH (c:Company)-[f1:foundedBy]->(p1:Person {name: 'Drake'}), (c)-[f2:foundedBy]->(p2:Person {name: '40'}) RETURN c.name

question: How many companies are either subsidiaries of Adidas AG or operate in the textile industry?
gold: CALL { MATCH (n:Company)-[r0:subsidiaryOf]->(m0:Company {name: 'Adidas AG'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Company)-[r1:operatesIn]->(m1:Industry {name: 'textile industry'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)
pred: MATCH (adidas:Company {name: 'Adidas AG'})-[:subsidiaryOf]->(c1:Company) OR (c2:Company)-[:operatesIn]->(industry:Industry {name: 'Textile'}) RETURN count(DISTINCT c1) + count(DISTINCT c2)
